attacking_style: Breakaway specialist who targets KOM points aggressively, contesting even fourth-category climbs when defending the jersey. Opportunistic in extended, large-group breaks rather than late solo moves.
team_tactics: Dual role: capable of critical GC domestique work (pacing leaders back after attacks, even with 30-40km remaining) but given freedom for breakaway hunting when not needed for team leader support.
terrain_preference: Mountain time trials reveal hidden strength against pure climbers. Performs best in long breakaways on medium mountain stages. Struggles severely on high-mountain stages in Grand Tours when riding for GC.
vulnerability: Catastrophic form collapse on Grand Tour mountain stages when not in breakaways—nearly last overall, struggling for time cuts. Cannot sustain GC efforts across three-week races at high altitude.
key_patterns: Defends KOM jersey defensively, contesting all points even against teammates (2022 Tour evidence)
Excels in large breakaways given freedom; 15-rider groups with 5+ minute gaps (2022 examples)
Strong time trialist on climbing courses, beating pure climbers in mountain TTs (2022 Romandie)
Willing domestique sacrificing own chances for GC leaders when required (2017 Giro)
Form collapses dramatically when forced to ride full mountain stages with peloton (2023 Tour)
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 Tour showed catastrophic decline on mountains compared to competitive 2022 KOM campaign, suggesting aging or accumulated fatigue
